title: Pfizer CDO on Scaling AI Governance Across 100+ Data Domains
summary: Chief Data Officer shares how Pfizer built enterprise-wide data governance framework to support AI deployment across regulated environments. Key challenges: data quality at scale, compliance with FDA requirements, and enabling self-service analytics for 80,000 employees.
reason: Direct CDO mention, enterprise AI governance, large-scale data org

title: Chief AI Officer Role Surges: 35% of Fortune 500 Now Have CAIO
summary: New survey finds Chief AI Officer appointments accelerating, with 35% of Fortune 500 companies naming dedicated CAIOs in 2025, up from 12% in 2023. Role scope varies widely from technical to strategic.
reason: CAIO role trend, enterprise executive audience

title: Snowflake Cortex Analyst: Natural Language to SQL for Enterprise Data Teams
summary: Snowflake launches Cortex Analyst, enabling data teams to query Snowflake using natural language. Product targets CDOs and analytics leaders looking to democratize data access without BI tool overhead.
reason: Major vendor product directly targeting CDO/analytics buyers

title: Why Most Enterprise AI Pilots Never Reach Production
summary: Gartner research reveals 85% of enterprise AI pilot projects fail to reach production. Root causes: data quality gaps, lack of governance frameworks, and misalignment between data teams and business stakeholders.
reason: CDO pain point #1 per Gartner Summit, directly actionable for our audience

title: Databricks AI/BI Genie: Conversational Analytics for the Enterprise
summary: Databricks announces AI/BI Genie, a conversational analytics layer built into the Databricks Lakehouse. Chief Data Officers can now give non-technical executives natural language access to governed data.
reason: Major vendor, CDO-relevant product launch

title: Monte Carlo Data Raises $135M to Expand Data Observability Platform
summary: Data observability startup Monte Carlo Data closes $135M Series D, valuing the company at $1.6B. The platform monitors data pipelines for quality issues, a top priority for enterprise CDOs managing complex data stacks.
reason: Vendor we track, funding signal, CDO-relevant category

title: CDAO at JPMorgan: How We Govern 500 Active AI Models in Production
summary: JPMorgan's Chief Data & Analytics Officer details the governance framework supporting 500+ production AI models. Topics: model risk management, lineage tracking, explainability requirements under OCC guidance.
reason: CDAO title, specific enterprise AI governance at scale, financial sector

title: Agentic AI in the Enterprise: What CDOs Need to Know in 2026
summary: As autonomous AI agents move from prototype to production, Chief Data Officers face new governance challenges: agent access to sensitive data, audit trails for agent decisions, and integration with existing data catalogs.
reason: Agentic AI + CDO governance — intersection of top 2 themes at Gartner Summit

title: Alation Named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Catalogs

title: Enterprise AI Strategy 2026: From Pilot to Production at Scale
summary: MIT Sloan Management Review survey of 650 data executives finds organizations with dedicated Chief AI Officers are 3x more likely to successfully scale AI beyond pilot stage. Data governance investment is the #1 predictor.
